rulings.Case Title: ZANKEL RESTAURANT GROUP ONE VS MCGEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hrng On Demurrer By Deft, Michael Mcgee To 2nd Causeof Action, Calendar Motion: Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FRAUD AND FALSE PROMISE CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CONCEALMENT CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD BASIS FOR DUTY TO DISCLOSE, E.G., FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP, PARTIAL DISCLOSURE, ETC. OVERRULE AS TO EXEMPLARY DAMAGES BECAUSE MOTION TO STRIKE IS PROPER VEHICLE TO ATTACK SUCH A CLAIM. SEE VENICE TOWN COUNCIL, INC. V. CITY OF LOS ANGELES, (1996) 47 CAL.APP.4TH 1547, 1562. (PB)
